mnemonics: SPICES: Scope, Planning, Implementation, Control, Execution, Staffing - The essential ingredients for a successful project.
keyPoints: Project Planning: Defining scope, schedule, cost, quality, and resources.
Project Control: Monitoring progress, managing risks, and implementing change control.
Team Management: Organizing, leading, and motivating the project team.
commonMistakes: Focusing only on technical tasks and ignoring management activities like planning and communication.
Underestimating the time and effort required for risk management and quality assurance.
Treating the project plan as a static document instead of a living guide that requires regular updates.
